About AQ Group

London's Trusted Home Improvers

Founded in 2016, AQ Group has transformed hundreds of homes across London. Honest pricing, expert craftsmanship and results that exceed expectations every time.

15+ Years of Excellence

A decade and a half delivering premium results across London.

Fully Insured & Certified

£10M public liability, Checkatrade approved, all trades accredited.

Tidy, Respectful & On Time

We protect your home throughout and leave every job spotlessly clean.

Written Guarantee on All Work

Every project is fully guaranteed in writing for your peace of mind.
